bot.no_services: No services configured yet. Please contact the salon.
bot.invalid_choice: Please reply with a valid number or BACK.
bot.too_many_messages: Too many messages — please wait a minute and try again.
bot.inactive: This business is not accepting bookings right now. Please try again later.
bot.reschedule_confirm: Got it! Your old booking is cancelled. Let's pick a new time.
bot.csat_ask:
How was your experience? Rate 1-5:
1 ⭐ Poor
2 ⭐⭐ Below average
3 ⭐⭐⭐ Average
4 ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Good
5 ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent
bot.csat_thanks_1: We're sorry to hear that. We'll work to improve. Thank you for the feedback.
bot.csat_thanks_2: Thank you for letting us know. We'll do better next time.
bot.csat_thanks_3: Thanks for the feedback! We appreciate it.
bot.csat_thanks_4: Great to hear! Thank you for your feedback.
bot.csat_thanks_5: Wonderful! So glad you had a great experience! 🌟
